content: 2025 ICM curiosity-driven autonomous agents can leverage a nested self-reference memory architecture, where the agent continuously encodes its own curiosity-seeking exploration trajectories as new training data for its intrinsic reward predictor, turning the recursive overlap of 'agent' definitions in existing research into a functional advantage rather than a conceptual ambiguity. This self-reinforcing curiosity loop lets the agent prioritize exploring understudied parts of its own decision space, not just the external environment.
